docs.title: Frontend Overview
docs.purpose: Capture frontend architecture, rendering model, app shell, and client-side ownership boundaries.

docs.title: UI/UX Flow
docs.purpose: Capture user journeys, screen states, interaction rules, empty states, and UX constraints.

docs.title: Design System
docs.purpose: Capture reusable design decisions, component standards, visual language, and design-system boundaries.

docs.title: Design Tokens
docs.purpose: Capture color, typography, spacing, radius, shadow, motion, and theme token decisions.

docs.title: Component Inventory
docs.purpose: Track reusable components, variants, props, composition rules, and ownership notes.

docs.title: State and Routing
docs.purpose: Capture routes, state boundaries, URL behavior, client data flow, and navigation constraints.

docs.title: Accessibility
docs.purpose: Capture accessibility requirements, keyboard behavior, semantic structure, and contrast decisions.

docs.title: Frontend Test Plan
docs.purpose: Capture frontend unit, integration, visual, accessibility, and browser verification coverage.

docs.title: Backend Architecture
docs.purpose: Capture backend module boundaries, service responsibilities, runtime assumptions, and request flow.

docs.title: API Contracts
docs.purpose: Capture routes, request/response contracts, status codes, middleware behavior, and compatibility notes.

docs.title: Database Design
docs.purpose: Capture storage technology, schema, migrations, indexes, relations, and data integrity constraints.

docs.title: Domain Model
docs.purpose: Capture domain entities, state transitions, invariants, and service-level business rules.

docs.title: Auth and Security
docs.purpose: Capture authentication, authorization, session/token rules, validation, secrets, and security assumptions.

docs.title: Integrations and Events
docs.purpose: Capture external integrations, webhooks, queues, events, retries, and failure behavior.

docs.title: Errors and Logging
docs.purpose: Capture error taxonomy, logging fields, observability assumptions, and incident diagnostics.

docs.title: Backend Test Plan
docs.purpose: Capture backend unit, integration, contract, migration, and security regression coverage.

docs.title: Runtime Architecture
docs.purpose: Capture runtime topology, service boundaries, environments, and operational dependencies.

docs.title: Environments
docs.purpose: Capture local, staging, production, env vars, configuration sources, and parity risks.

docs.title: CI/CD
docs.purpose: Capture pipeline stages, required checks, release gates, and automation ownership.

docs.title: Deployment Runbook
docs.purpose: Capture deploy commands, pre-flight checks, smoke tests, rollback trigger points, and operators.

docs.title: Observability
docs.purpose: Capture health checks, logs, metrics, traces, dashboards, alerts, and known blind spots.

docs.title: Incident Response
docs.purpose: Capture incident roles, triage flow, severity criteria, communication, and postmortem expectations.

docs.title: Secrets and Config
docs.purpose: Capture secrets handling, config loading, rotation expectations, and environment safety.

docs.title: Rollback
docs.purpose: Capture rollback paths, data migration reversibility, backup assumptions, and stop-ship criteria.

docs.title: Admin Scope
docs.purpose: Capture admin-system goals, operator personas, permission boundary, and non-goals.

docs.title: Roles and Permissions
docs.purpose: Capture role definitions, permission matrix, escalation rules, and authorization risks.

docs.title: Admin Flows
docs.purpose: Capture admin user journeys, screens, moderation flows, approval flows, and UX constraints.

docs.title: Audit Logs
docs.purpose: Capture audit events, retention, visibility, tamper concerns, and review workflows.

docs.title: Admin Data Management
docs.purpose: Capture admin data operations, exports, destructive actions, recovery, and approval safeguards.

docs.title: Dashboards and Reports
docs.purpose: Capture admin dashboards, report definitions, metrics, filtering, and data freshness expectations.

docs.title: Test Strategy
docs.purpose: Capture test pyramid, risk-based coverage, required checks, and verification ownership.

docs.title: Regression Map
docs.purpose: Capture bugs, reproduction paths, regression tests, affected modules, and fix evidence.

docs.title: E2E Flows
docs.purpose: Capture end-to-end journeys, selectors, fixtures, browser coverage, and flake risks.
